title: Playground Admin Register
concept: A dense WordPress-admin-like dashboard for repeat core contributor use, where the first viewport is a saved Playground register with filters, row actions, and an inline workflow inspector that exposes save destinations, destructive actions, route-specific launch inputs, and resulting states.
focus: neutral WordPress admin palette with one blue accent
flows: Manage temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory Playgrounds from a first-viewport register with save, rename, delete, reset, export, file, database, and log row actions.
Save an unsaved Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination controls, progress, and resulting saved-state rows.

Start or replace the current Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import with route-specific inputs and visible replacement consequences.
Browse a credible Blueprint catalog with category filters, search, 1-12 of 43 density, selected detail, run selected, and inspect JSON behavior.
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, reset/reload warnings, export to GitHub, and zip download.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
